description: Search and filter tasks by keyword, status, priority, tags, and due date with flexible criteria

changes: Initial implementation for search and filter feature

keyword.description: Search keyword for title/description (case-insensitive, partial match). Example: 'grocery' matches 'Buy groceries'

status_filter.description: Filter by completion status: true (completed only), false (incomplete only), null (all tasks)

priority_filter.description: Filter by priority level, null for all priorities

tags_filter.description: Filter by tags (OR logic: tasks with ANY of these tags). Empty array returns all tasks.

due_date_filter.description: Filter by due date category. null returns all tasks regardless of due date.

natural_language_examples.intent: Find tasks containing 'grocery' in title or description
natural_language_examples.expected_behavior: Returns tasks with 'grocery' anywhere in title or description (case-insensitive)
Returns only incomplete tasks tagged with 'work'

natural_language_examples.intent: Filter by due date and priority
natural_language_examples.expected_behavior: Returns high priority tasks with due dates in the past

natural_language_examples.user_input: search report in completed tasks due this week
natural_language_examples.intent: Combined keyword search + status + due date filters
natural_language_examples.expected_behavior: Returns completed tasks containing 'report' with due dates within this week

natural_language_examples.intent: Filter by multiple tags with OR logic
natural_language_examples.expected_behavior: Returns tasks with either 'urgent' OR 'work' tags (OR logic)

performance_requirements.implementation_approach: PostgreSQL ILIKE with composite indexes, database-level filtering

security_requirements: User isolation: Only return tasks belonging to authenticated user
SQL injection prevention via parameterized queries

understanding_commands: User says 'work or urgent' → tags_filter=['work', 'urgent'] (OR logic)
Combine multiple criteria with AND logic between filter types
response_formatting: Show result count: 'Found 5 tasks matching your criteria' or 'Showing 5 of 50 tasks'
If no results: 'No tasks found matching your criteria. Try removing some filters.'
Summarize applied filters: 'Showing incomplete work tasks due today'

test_cases.expected_behavior: Returns tasks with 'grocery' in title or description
Returns tasks matching ALL criteria (AND logic between filter types)
Returns all user's tasks (equivalent to list_tasks)
